SCR-2026-05-001.list_subtitle: Adhoc screening · Meridian Energy Pension Scheme

summary.headline: No matches across FinCEN
summary.description: Auto-cleared by Decision Engine. No analyst review required.

analysis.label: Likely Different
analysis.headline: Despite the watchlist record listing an alias identical to the screened name (“Meridian Energy Pension Scheme”), the identity context provided is for “Bavarian Industrial Fund / Bavarian IF” in Munich. Key identifiers and core attributes do not align: legal name is different, street address and postal code differ, and the tax identifier differs. The only overlaps are city/country (Munich, DE), which are non-unique. Additionally, the cedent’s registration number value (DE-883-914) matches the watchlist tax identification number, but the cedent labels it as a company registration number while also providing a different tax number (DE-1201-442-008); this inconsistent identifier mapping is insufficient to conclude a true match without corroborating evidence. Overall, the match appears to be a false positive driven by alias/name similarity rather than shared identity.
analysis.body: IRiS weighed name, jurisdiction, registration and ownership indicators against the screening caches.
